title: scutia spicata var. pauciflora
intro: Scutia spicata var. pauciflora, also known as the few-flowered Scutia, is a plant species belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Scutia spicata var. pauciflora is used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
